pi_items.source: Verified against verifier.py:74 which checks surf_count >= 2
Verified against export_result.sh:77 which checks if t < 0.1 for opaque surfaces
Verified against export_result.sh:80 which checks if 0.2 <= t <= 0.9 for transparent surfaces
Verified against export_result.sh:80 which checks if 0.2 <= t <= 0.9 for transparent surfaces

Verified against downloaded 0051.zip from https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip containing 108 DICOM files in directory 0051, which is placed under ct_cranium directory per setup_invesalius.sh:103

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real medical imaging data: a CT Cranium DICOM series (0051) containing 108 DICOM files downloaded from the official InVesalius v3.0 GitHub release. The metadata defines validation thresholds: minimum 2 surfaces required, with at least one opaque surface (transparency < 0.1) and at least one transparent surface (0.2 <= transparency <= 0.9). The output file must be saved as skin_bone_overlay.inv3 in /home/ga/Documents/.
